name: RMW - FAMAS F1
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The Famas was the first modern assault rifle of the French army, and it became synonimus with French soldiers. It's shaped weird and is a bullpup, pretty much the first bullpup rifle to be adopted by any armed forces. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
